name: fish_player_99
label: Fish
advice: Calls rivers with anything. Bluff little; bet thin for value with medium pairs.

name: nit_reg_37
label: Nit
advice: Folds to 3-bets ~80% of the time. Attack his opens in position constantly.

name: solid_pro_scorza
label: Solid Reg
advice: Keeps GTO opens. Exploit via blind-defense adjustments.

name: villain_crusher
label: LAG Reg
advice: 3-bets a lot from the blinds. Tighten your BTN open and value 4-bet.

name: whale_caller
label: Whale
advice: Limp-calls 80% of hands preflop. Isolate to 4x and c-bet every flop.

name: loose_cannon
label: Maniac
advice: Over-bluffs postflop. Check-call top pairs and induce river shoves. Never fold premium draws.

name: sunday_grinder
label: Solid Reg
advice: Tight preflop, respects big river action. Bluff turn check-raises work.

name: shark_reg
label: LAG Reg
advice: Defends blinds wide. Steal smaller from the BTN (2.0x) and check back on dry low flops.

name: muck_master
label: Weak Tight
advice: C-bets the flop but folds to raises. Float flop leads with backdoors to take the pot.

name: tilt_machine
label: Tilter
advice: Opens wide on tilt. Value bet big. Do not try to bluff him off pairs.
